short_summary: Iran deal close, US attention risk
rationale: Khamenei's death and the reported proximity of a US-Iran deal represent a qualitative shift: if the deal is signed, US diplomatic and military attention may further divert from Ukraine, while energy market changes could affect Western aid economics.

top_events.title: Khamenei dies; US-Iran deal reportedly near, Lebanon strikes continue
top_events.summary: Iran's Supreme Leader has died and a US-Iran deal is said to be close — a qualitative shift that risks further diverting US attention and resources away from Ukraine. Lebanon fighting continues despite deal proximity.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI suspended for foreign nationals by US order
top_events.summary: US restricts Anthropic AI for non-US nationals; minor indirect effect on Ukraine's access to Western digital tools and tech support.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues at high intensity
top_events.summary: Active combat continues across Ukrainian territory with no qualitative change reported this cycle. Background remains at maximum level.
